Title: Project Architect
Job Description:
About the Role

We are looking for a dynamic Architect / Project Architect with hands-on experience in architectural planning, redevelopment projects, and municipal approvals. The role involves working on residential and commercial developments across the Mumbai Metropolitan Region.

Key Responsibilities

• Preparation of architectural planning drawings for residential and commercial buildings

• Development of concept plans, sanction drawings, and working drawings

• Assistance in redevelopment feasibility studies and project planning

• Preparation of drawings for municipal submissions and approvals

• Coordination with RCC, MEP consultants, developers, and liaison teams

• Participation in project planning discussions and design development

Required Skills

• Experience working on projects in Thane / Mumbai Metropolitan Region

• Strong knowledge of UDCPR / DCPR regulations and development control norms

• Experience in residential and commercial building planning

• Ability to perform FSI calculations and feasibility studies

• Experience in preparing approval drawings for municipal authorities

Software Skills

• AutoCAD (Mandatory)

• Knowledge of SketchUp / Lumion / 3D visualization tools will be an advantage

Qualification

Bachelor of Architecture (B.Arch)

COA Registration preferred

Additional Requirements

• Practical exposure to redevelopment or multi-storey residential projects

• Ability to handle planning, documentation, and coordination responsibilities independently

Title: Server Administrator
Job Description:
Are you a skilled Server Engineer with a passion for managing complex IT environments? Join our growing IT team to support and scale mission-critical systems in a dynamic BPO setup.

🔧 Key Responsibilities:

Administer and troubleshoot Windows Servers, Active Directory, DNS, and DHCP.
Manage and maintain virtualization platforms such as VMware and Hyper-V.
Work with cloud environments like AWS and Azure.
Implement and monitor server security, patching, backup strategies, and disaster recovery.
Automate routine tasks using PowerShell or other scripting tools.
✅ Requirements:

4–8 years of relevant experience in Windows Server administration.
Strong hands-on experience with virtualization and system performance tuning.
Familiarity with backup solutions, patch management, and IT security best practices.
Ability to work in night shifts as part of a BPO environment.

Title: Integration Specialist
Job Description:
About the Role

We’re building intelligent, resilient integration platforms that power seamless digital ecosystems.

If you’re passionate about Boomi, DevOps, and platform reliability, this role puts you at the heart of Integration Management, CI/CD Automation, and Site Reliability Engineering (SRE).

This isn’t just an admin role—it’s a high-impact opportunity to own and scale enterprise integration platforms.

💡 What You’ll Do

Boomi Platform Ownership

Manage Atom, Molecule & Cloud configurations
Troubleshoot runtimes, connectors & deployments
Ensure high availability with automated recovery
CI/CD & DevOps Automation

Build and maintain pipelines (Jenkins / GitHub Actions / GitLab CI)
Implement Git-based deployment & rollback strategies
Site Reliability Engineering (SRE)

Monitor SLIs/SLOs using tools like Datadog
Automate alerts, health checks & incident response
Drive continuous improvement & postmortems
Integration & Security

Manage MFT (AS2, SFTP, FTPS) with partners
Ensure compliance with enterprise security standards
What We’re Looking For

✔ 10–12 years in Integration / DevOps / Platform Engineering

✔ Strong expertise in Boomi Administration (Molecule, tuning, troubleshooting)

✔ Hands-on with Linux, networking & shell scripting

✔ Experience with Kubernetes, Docker, Helm

✔ CI/CD pipeline experience

✔ Understanding of observability, monitoring & reliability engineering

Title: Technical Lead
Job Description:
Key Responsibilities

Lead the design, architecture, and development of scalable applications.
Mentor and guide developers; provide technical direction and performance feedback.
Ensure timely and quality delivery by collaborating with cross-functional teams.
Conduct code reviews, enforce best practices, and drive continuous improvement.
Troubleshoot complex issues and help remove technical blockers.
Maintain technical documentation, architecture diagrams, and standards.
Work closely with Product & Delivery teams to convert business needs into technical solutions.
Contribute to technology strategy, project planning, and hiring efforts.


Technical Skills Required

Backend: Node.js, Python (FastAPI)

Frontend: ReactJS or AngularJS

Database: MongoDB, PostgreSQL

Cloud Platforms: AWS / GCP / Azure

Good to Have: RESTful APIs, Microservices, CI/CD, Terraform, Docker, Kubernetes

Title: Data Engineer
Job Description:
Role Overview:

We are seeking a Data Engineer who can design, build, and optimize scalable ETL pipelines and real-time data processing systems, handling high-volume datasets in distributed environments.

Key Highlights:

• Expertise in PySpark, Apache Spark (Core, SQL, Structured Streaming)

• Strong experience with Kafka (Confluent/Apache) for real-time data ingestion

• Hands-on with Informatica or similar ETL tools

• Experience with Cloudera Hadoop ecosystem and distributed databases (SingleStore preferred)

• Strong programming skills in Python / Scala / SQL

• Exposure to large-scale data processing (~40TB data, ~5TB daily ingestion)

• Experience in batch and real-time architectures

• Knowledge of Medallion Architecture (Bronze, Silver, Gold layers) is a plus

• Familiarity with workflow orchestration tools like Airflow/Oozie

• Experience in BFSI or Telecom domains preferred

Key Responsibilities:

• Build and optimize scalable ETL pipelines (batch + real-time)

• Develop streaming frameworks for low-latency analytics

• Ensure data quality, governance, and performance optimization

• Collaborate with cross-functional teams for data-driven insights

• Improve system scalability, reliability, and cost efficiency

Title: Integration Support Engineer
Job Description:
Key Responsibilities:

Provide frontline troubleshooting & support for integration issues using Boomi
Handle customer interactions via calls, chat, and email—owning issues end-to-end
Diagnose root causes and deliver effective technical solutions
Support both:
Real-time integrations (API / REST / SOAP)
Batch processes (SFTP / file-based workflows)
Design and implement integration solutions:
Connectors (HTTP, SFTP, databases)
Data transformations
Error handling & logging
Monitor system performance, logs, and ensure high availability & reliability
Collaborate with engineering/product teams for complex issues
Participate in on-call support rotation (including weekends if needed)
Technical Skills Required:

Strong experience with SQL (T-SQL, DDL, DML) – SQL Server preferred
Hands-on with Boomi or similar iPaaS platforms
Knowledge of:
JavaScript / Groovy / Java
ETL / ELT processes
APIs (REST / SOAP)
Understanding of:
Networking fundamentals
Performance tuning
Exposure to:
Cloud platforms (AWS / Azure / GCP)
DevOps tools (CI/CD, Docker, Kubernetes, Terraform)
Familiarity with tools like Jira / ServiceNow
Soft Skills

Strong problem-solving mindset
Excellent communication (technical + business)
Ability to work independently under pressure
Customer-first attitude with empathy
Collaborative team player
Education & Experience

Bachelor’s degree in a technical field (or equivalent experience)
Minimum 2+ years of customer-facing technical support experience
Experience in Boomi or other integration platforms preferred
Agile/Scrum environment exposure
🏆 Certifications:

Boomi Certifications:
Associate Developer
Professional Developer

Title: Network Administrator
Job Description:
Position Summary

We are looking for a skilled IT Infrastructure Network Administrator to manage and own the organization’s end-to-end network infrastructure across PAN India. The role requires strong hands-on expertise in networking, security, and infrastructure planning, along with the ability to align technology initiatives with business objectives.

Key Accountabilities

Manage and own the organization’s overall technology infrastructure including PAN India network, security systems, and end-user devices
Develop and execute a technology roadmap aligned with business strategy (short-term and long-term)
Design and implement robust network systems to support finance and accounting operations
Oversee network management across Head Office, branches, and cloud environments
Define infrastructure roadmap, budgeting, and technology evaluation
Ensure seamless integration of network platforms, applications, and communication systems
Handle vendor management for network infrastructure
Key Responsibilities

Own and manage the complete network infrastructure setup
Configure and manage networking, routing, and switching
Ensure high levels of network security, connectivity, and uptime
Work with firewalls, VPNs, remote access, and troubleshooting
Manage and monitor Cisco and FortiGate hardware
Track network performance metrics (availability, utilization, latency, throughput)
Assess infrastructure requirements based on performance and scalability
Required Experience

5–7 years of experience in IT Infrastructure / Network Administration
Prior experience in Banking, NBFC, or Fintech is mandatory
Experience leading or managing infrastructure teams
Startup experience will be an added advantage
Required Qualification

BE / B.Tech / M.Tech (Computer Science, IT, or related field)
Technical Competencies

Network management & installation
Datacenter networking
Hands-on experience with Cisco and FortiGate hardware
Strong understanding of routing, switching, firewalls, and VPNs

Title: Senior Graphic Designer
Job Description:
Job Title: Senior Graphic Designer

Location: Thane

Experience: 5–6 Years

Employment Type: Full-time

Role Overview

We are looking for a creative and strategic Senior Graphic Designer who can drive both design execution and communication strategy. The ideal candidate should have strong exposure to global design standards, the ability to lead a team, and experience working directly with clients.



Key Responsibilities

Develop and execute creative concepts, visual storytelling, and design strategies
Build and implement communication strategies aligned with brand objectives
Lead and mentor a team of designers, ensuring high-quality deliverables
Work closely with clients to understand requirements and present creative ideas
Create engaging designs across digital platforms (social media, branding, campaigns, etc.)
Incorporate animation and motion graphics into design projects
Stay updated with global design trends and apply them effectively
Utilize AI tools for graphic design to enhance creativity and productivity


Required Skills & Qualifications

5–6 years of experience in graphic design and visualizing
Strong portfolio showcasing creative, strategic, and branding work
Hands-on experience in communication strategy + design strategy
Proficiency in tools like Adobe Creative Suite (Photoshop, Illustrator, After Effects, etc.)
Experience in animation and motion graphics
Exposure to international/global clients or projects
Strong client-facing and presentation skills


Good to Have

Experience working in an agency or fast-paced environment
Strong understanding of branding and marketing principles

Title: Cloud Engineer
Job Description:
Key Responsibilities

Architect and implement scalable, highly available, and fault-tolerant AWS solutions
Automate infrastructure provisioning using Infrastructure as Code (IaC) tools like Terraform or Ansible
Design and manage CI/CD pipelines for seamless deployment
Monitor system performance, availability, and reliability using AWS and third-party tools
Ensure security best practices, compliance, and governance across cloud environments
Optimize cloud costs and resource utilization
Troubleshoot infrastructure and application issues in production environments
Collaborate with development, DevOps, and cross-functional teams
Maintain clear documentation for systems, processes, and workflows


Mandatory Skills

Strong expertise in AWS services:
EC2, S3, VPC, Lambda, RDS, DynamoDB, EKS, ECS, IAM, CloudFormation, CloudWatch
Experience with CI/CD tools and pipelines
Hands-on experience with Terraform and/or Ansible
Proficiency in scripting (Python and/or Bash)
Strong understanding of cloud security, monitoring, and best practices

Title: Head of Sales
Job Description:
Job Title: Sales Head

Location: Thane, Maharashtra

Experience: 10+ Years

Industry: EPC (Engineering, Procurement & Construction) – Chemical Sector

Employment Type: Full-Time

Role Overview

We are seeking an experienced and dynamic Sales Head to lead and drive business growth for our EPC projects in the chemical industry. The ideal candidate should have a strong technical foundation in chemical engineering along with proven expertise in sales strategy, client acquisition, and revenue generation within EPC environments.

Key Responsibilities

Develop and execute strategic sales plans to achieve business targets and expand market presence
Identify new business opportunities in the chemical and process industries
Build and maintain strong relationships with clients, consultants, and key stakeholders
Lead end-to-end sales cycle including lead generation, proposal development, negotiation, and closure
Collaborate with engineering, project, and procurement teams for customized solutions
Monitor market trends, competitor activities, and industry developments
Manage and mentor the sales team, ensuring performance targets are met
Drive revenue growth, profitability, and customer satisfaction
Key Requirements

Bachelor’s degree in Chemical Engineering (mandatory)
Minimum 10 years of experience in sales/business development within EPC companies
Strong understanding of chemical/process industry projects
Proven track record of achieving sales targets and managing key accounts
Excellent communication, negotiation, and leadership skills
Ability to handle multiple stakeholders and large-scale project discussions
Preferred Skills

Experience in handling turnkey projects and industrial clients
Strong network within the chemical manufacturing industry
Strategic thinking and problem-solving abilities

Title: Technical Sales Executive
Job Description:
Job Title: Technical Sales Engineer

Location: Thane

Experience: 1–5 Years

Qualification: BE/B.Tech in Mechanical or Chemical Engineering

Role Overview

We are seeking a dynamic and results-driven Technical Sales Engineer with a strong engineering background to promote and sell industrial products and solutions. The ideal candidate will act as a bridge between technical capabilities and customer requirements, ensuring effective solutioning and successful deal closures.

Key Responsibilities

Identify and develop new business opportunities across industrial and commercial sectors
Promote and sell mechanical products, equipment, and engineering solutions
Understand customer requirements and recommend suitable technical solutions
Deliver technical presentations and product demonstrations to clients
Generate enquiries, prepare quotations, and drive order closures
Build and maintain strong relationships with existing clients for repeat business
Coordinate with internal teams (design, production, logistics) for smooth execution
Conduct site visits, inspections, and client meetings
Monitor market trends, competitor activities, and pricing strategies
Achieve monthly and annual sales targets
Job Specifications

Educational Qualification

BE/B.Tech in Mechanical Engineering (Chemical Engineering candidates may also apply)
Experience

1–5 years in technical sales / industrial sales
Preferred Industry Exposure

Chemical Industry
Petrochemical Industry
Oil & Gas
Power Plants
Fertilizer Plants
Skills Required

Strong technical knowledge of mechanical systems and industrial products
Excellent communication and negotiation skills
Ability to read and interpret technical drawings and specifications
Strong sales acumen and customer handling skills
Proficiency in MS Office (Excel, Word, PowerPoint)
Familiarity with CRM tools is an advantage.


Interested candidates can share resume on saloni@digifocal.in

Title: Export Executive
Job Description:
Job Title: Executive – Export Documentation

Location: Chembur, Mumbai, Maharashtra

Experience: 3+ Years

Industry: Pharmaceutical (Finished Formulation)

Job Overview

We are looking for a detail-oriented Executive – Export Documentation to manage end-to-end export documentation and coordination within the pharmaceutical sector. The ideal candidate should have hands-on experience in export processes for finished formulations and strong coordination skills with internal and external stakeholders.

Key Responsibilities

Handle complete pre & post export documentation
Coordinate with CHA (Clearing House Agent) for shipment processing
Manage freight booking and ensure timely follow-ups
Track vessel movements and coordinate with insurance companies
Handle bank documentation and payments in compliance with terms
Arrange BRC (Bank Realization Certificate) and follow up on Bill of Lading
Prepare and maintain weekly/monthly MIS reports
Liaise with internal departments to ensure smooth export operations
Communicate with authorities, customers, and suppliers across geographies
Eligibility Criteria

Education: Pharma Graduate
Experience: Minimum 3+ years in export documentation (Pharma – Finished Formulation preferred)
Skills Required

Strong knowledge of export documentation and compliance
Experience in dealing with CHA and logistics partners
Good understanding of banking procedures in exports
Excellent coordination and communication skills
Attention to detail and ability to manage timelines

Title: Purchasing Manager
Job Description:
Hiring: Purchase Manager – Procurement & Supply Chain (P2P)

Location: Chembur, Mumbai

We are looking for a dynamic Purchase Manager with strong experience in pharmaceutical procurement and supply chain (P2P) to manage end-to-end operations and support export-focused third-party manufacturing.

Key Responsibilities:

Manage complete Procure-to-Pay (P2P) cycle
Vendor management and cost optimization through negotiations
Handle Loan License operations with WHO-GMP manufacturers
Sourcing, import permits, and tender-based procurement
Coordinate monthly shipments with CHA and logistics partners
Maintain vendor relationships and monitor performance
Ensure inventory availability and regulatory compliance
Lead and mentor procurement team
What We’re Looking For:

Experience in pharmaceutical procurement or supply chain
Strong vendor management and negotiation skills
Knowledge of WHO-GMP and regulatory standards
Excellent coordination and logistics management
Team handling experience

Title: Account Executive
Job Description:
*Job Opening – Accounts Assistant*

We are looking for a detail-oriented and organized *Accounts Assistant* to support our finance department.

*Responsibilities:*
• Maintain purchase & sales records
• Process invoices, bills, and vouchers
• Handle accounts payable & receivable
• Perform bank reconciliations
• Assist with GST/TDS filing
• Maintain petty cash records
• Update accounting software and Excel sheets
• Prepare financial reports and support closing activities

*Requirements:*
• B.Com or relevant commerce/accounting background
• Basic knowledge of accounting principles
• Knowledge of Tally, QuickBooks, and MS Excel preferred
• Good communication and organizational skills

Title: Senior Network Engineer
Job Description:
Senior Network Engineer
Location: Bangalore
Work Mode: 4 Days Work From Office(Hybrid)
Experience: 8+ Years
Joining: Immediate Joiners Preferred
We are looking for an experienced Senior Network Engineer with strong enterprise networking expertise and excellent communication skills. The ideal candidate should have hands-on experience with modern networking, cloud connectivity, and network security solutions.
Key Requirements
Minimum 8+ years of relevant experience in enterprise network engineering.
Strong hands-on experience with:
SD-WAN (Cisco, Meraki)
Cloud Networking (Aviatrix, AWS, Azure)
Network Security (Palo Alto, Zscaler)
Monitoring & Observability Tools (SolarWinds, Splunk)
Strong knowledge of routing, switching, firewalls, VPNs, DNS/DHCP.
Experience with automation/scripting (Python, Ansible, Terraform) is a plus.
Familiarity with ITSM tools like ServiceNow.
Understanding of Agile / Lean methodologies.
Ability to create and maintain high-quality technical documentation.
Strong communication and collaboration skills.
Ability to manage multiple priorities in a fast-paced environment.
Important Notes
We are looking for immediate joiners or candidates who can join quickly.
Role requires working from office 4 days a week.
Interested candidates can share their resume on saloni@digifocal.in

Title: Hadoop Platform Engineer
Job Description: Key Responsibilities Install, configure, and manage Cloudera clusters using Cloudera Manager Administer Hadoop ecosystem components such as HDFS, YARN, Hive, Impala, and Spark Manage and support modern storage layers including Apache Ozone as an alternative to HDFS Implement and manage table formats like Apache Iceberg for large-scale analytical workloads Monitor cluster health, performance, and capacity planning Troubleshoot and resolve issues related to cluster operations, job failures, and performance bottlenecks Implement and manage data security using Kerberos, Apache Ranger, and Apache Atlas Perform upgrades, patches, and version migrations across Cloudera distributions (CDH/CDP) Automate administrative tasks using scripting (Shell/Python) Manage backup, replication, and disaster recovery strategies across storage layers (HDFS/Ozone) Collaborate with data engineering teams to optimize workloads on Iceberg tables Ensure compliance with enterprise data governance and security policies Required Skills & Qualifications Strong experience with Cloudera Distribution (CDH/CDP) Deep understanding of Hadoop ecosystem components Hands-on experience with Apache Ozone and/or object storage concepts Working knowledge of Apache Iceberg including schema evolution, partitioning, and time travel Strong Linux/Unix system administration skills Experience with cluster sizing, tuning, and performance optimization Knowledge of distributed systems and parallel processing Familiarity with cloud platforms like AWS, Azure, or GCP Experience with scheduling tools like Apache Oozie or Apache Airflow Strong scripting skills (Bash, Python) Preferred Qualifications Cloudera Certified Administrator (CCA/CCP) Experience transitioning from HDFS to Ozone-based architectures Experience implementing Iceberg on Spark, Hive, or Impala Exposure to Docker and Kubernetes Experience with Prometheus and Grafana Understanding of DevOps practices and CI/CD pipelines Key Competencies Strong troubleshooting and root cause analysis skills Ability to manage high-availability distributed systems Collaboration with cross-functional data teams Proactive monitoring and platform optimization mindset Nice to Have (Value Add) Exposure to streaming technologies like Apache Kafka Experience with data lakehouse architectures Knowledge of metadata/catalog systems and governance frameworks

Title: Data Scientist
Job Description:
We’re Hiring: Data Scientist / Machine Learning Engineer (3–5 years experience)
Are you passionate about turning data into real business impact? We’re looking for a Data Scientist / ML Engineer to join our team and help productionize cutting-edge predictive models that power smarter decisions in the fintech and customer engagement space.

Location: Thane/ Pune/ Bangalore

What You’ll Do:
Build, deploy, and optimize predictive models across lending, collections, and CRM use cases.
Work hands-on with large-scale datasets and modern data pipelines.
Collaborate with cross-functional teams to translate business challenges into data-driven solutions.
Apply best practices in MLOps, model monitoring, and governance.
Communicate insights effectively to drive strategy and roadmap decisions.

What We’re Looking For:
3–5 years’ experience as a Data Scientist or ML Engineer, with proven experience productionizing ML models.
Expertise in Python and libraries like scikit-learn, pandas, numpy, xgboost, PyTorch/TensorFlow, spaCy/NLTK.
Strong SQL skills and comfort with cloud data lakes, ETL pipelines, and large messy datasets.
Experience deploying models via REST APIs, Docker, batch/streaming workflows.
Familiarity with data visualization / BI tools for business reporting.
A practical MLOps mindset—versioning, monitoring, retraining, and governance.
Excellent communicator who can operate independently and thrive in dynamic environments.
Nice-to-Have Skills:
Experience with cloud ML platforms (SageMaker, Vertex AI, Azure ML, Databricks).
NLP/NLU for chat or voice bots.
Reinforcement learning or optimization exposure.
Experience in regulated industries with focus on explainable AI.
Familiarity with MLOps tools (MLflow, Kubeflow, Airflow, Dataiku).
Contributions to open-source or research publications.

Interested candidates kindly share your resumes on shikha@digifocal.in

Title: Junior Interior designer
Job Description:
Job Title: Junior Interior Designer

Location: Wagle Estate, Thane
Working Days:
Monday to Friday: Work from Office (10:00 AM – 7:00 PM)
Saturday: Work from Home
About the Role
We are looking for a creative and detail-oriented Junior Interior Designer with around 2 years of experience in residential and commercial interior design projects. The ideal candidate should have a strong design sense and hands-on experience with design tools.
Key Responsibilities
Assist in designing residential and commercial interior spaces
Prepare detailed drawings, layouts, and plans using AutoCAD
Develop 2D and 3D design concepts as per client requirements
Work on space planning, material selection, and design coordination
Collaborate with senior designers and execution teams
Ensure timely delivery of design outputs with quality standards
Required Skills & Qualifications
2+ years of experience in interior design
Proficiency in AutoCAD (mandatory)
Knowledge of any 3D design software (e.g., SketchUp, 3ds Max, etc.)
Good understanding of design principles, materials, and finishes
Strong communication and coordination skills
Ability to work in a fast-paced environment

Title: Assistant Quality Assurance Manager
Job Description:
Hiring Now – Assistant Manager (Quality- BPO)
Location: Thane
Experience: 5+ Years (Including 2+ Years as AM – Quality)

Quality Assurance
• Implement & maintain QA protocols

Process Improvement

Compliance Management

 Team Leadership

 Qualifications

If this sounds like the right opportunity for you, we’d love to connect!
